name: Ruentex Industries Limited
summary: Ruentex Industries Limited engages in textile manufacturing, retailing, marketing, and trading activities. The company offers home decorative and filament fabrics, as well as finished products; cotton dobby, cotton jacquard, yarn dye, and piece dye products; and functional fabrics, including outlast cotton, bamboo, bamboo charcoal, and soybean fabrics. It also retails men's and women's wear, underwear, and bags under the NAUTICA, NAUTICA JEANS, Jeep, KOOKAI lingerie, MORGAN LINGERIE, HECHTER STUDIO, KENNETH COLE, KENNETH COLE REACTION, DANIEL CREMIEUX, and CHARLES RIVER brands. In addition, the company offers planning and design services for elderly homes, mass merchandisers, hypermarkets, parking lots, office buildings, science and technology plants, general housing, etc.; and construction drawing services. Ruentex Industries Limited is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
